tutorials.title: Scene 1: Authorisation Control Tower
tutorials.description: Start with one live case, review the fallback path, and carry the same transaction forward through the guided operator story.

tutorials.title: Scene 2: Oracle Internals Evidence Rail
tutorials.description: Open Oracle Internals, inspect runtime and focused-record evidence, and keep the same case synchronized with the briefing shell.

tutorials.title: Scene 3: Investigation Workbench
tutorials.description: Continue the current case first, use Oracle search only when needed, and inspect the same transaction inside the property graph.

tutorials.title: Scene 4: Scenario Lab
tutorials.description: Follow the active baseline, compare Oracle-scored variants, and use replay only as a supporting decision tool.

tutorials.title: Scene 5: Dataset Admin & Audit Trail
tutorials.description: Use Dataset Admin as a side utility for data stewardship, then close the story in Audit Trail with Oracle-backed governance evidence.
